wer_examples.label: Perfect transcription
wer_examples.reference: education is important for every child
wer_examples.hypothesis: education is important for every child

metric_explanations.BLEU: Measures exact n-gram matches. Higher is better. Range 0-100.
metric_explanations.chrF: Character n-gram F-score. Better than BLEU for morphologically rich languages like Ibibio. Higher is better.
metric_explanations.chrF++: chrF with word n-grams added. Most robust metric for Ibibio.
metric_explanations.METEOR: Considers synonyms and stemming. Better than BLEU for low-resource languages with shared word roots.
metric_explanations.WER: Word Error Rate for speech recognition. Lower is better. Range 0-100%.
